abstract: Note: ai.bythebay.io is ramping up for March 6-8. Use the code BAYAREAAI (https://www.universe.com/embed2/events/582a8788155c6b004e96b236?state=%7B%22currentDiscountCode%22%3A%7B%22code%22%3A%22BAYAREAAI%22%7D%7D) to register. We have a few lightning talks lined up. Thanks PubNub for hosting! The planned talks are on H2O and Image Segmentation. Propose yours!
event_title: 2017 Bay Area AI Kickoff on the 17th
title: 2017 Bay Area AI Kickoff on the 17th
